hypothesis: Fine-tuning the eSEN surrogate with an explicit hydrostatic-pressure input and a multi-task loss that upweights virial-stress errors by a factor of three will reduce stress MAE by at least 50% and VASP-restart SSNEB iterations by at least 30% while keeping MEP barrier deviations within 0.05 eV for CsPbI3 (α↔β, β↔γ) and TiO2-B→anatase transitions, compared to the unfine-tuned model.
